text:
Use the e-prescription app now to record your decision to donate organs in the **digital organ donation register** – safely and easily. 
 
 There are currently 9,192 people in Germany urgently waiting for an organ – every decision counts and can save lives. 
 
 Make your decision today and make an important contribution to the future of many people! ❤️‍🩹 
 
 You can find the organ donation register in the “Settings” tab in this app.

**Improved readability** 
 We've made our brand color a little darker to increase color contrast and thereby improve readability. 
 
 **Optimized features** 
 We've updated the format of the submission dates and corrected the sorting of the messages.

📖 **Read-aloud function** 
We have redesigned several pages so that they can be read aloud by TalkBack. This significantly improves usability for people with visual impairments. 
 
📞 **Extended contact options** 
We have introduced new contact options for selected insurance companies. 
 
🔧 **Optimized functions** 
We have fixed minor errors when reading the card, cleaned up the code and improved the display of messages.

**📲 Redeem prescribed DiGAs** 
You can now redeem prescriptions for digital health applications (DiGAs) directly via the e-prescription app. The prescriptions will be issued by specialists in Hamburg as part of a pilot project. You can find your activation code and the link to the DiGA right here in the e-prescription app. 
 
 **🏥 New pharmacy database** 
We have introduced a new, future-proof database for pharmacy searches.

**🌐 New translation function** 
If you use the app in another language, you can now translate the pharmacy's answers directly. 
 
 **♿️ Accessibility** 
Our accessibility statement is now available in the settings. The onboarding process has also been made more accessible. 
 
 **📲 Redeem DiGAs with insurance companies** 
Prescriptions for digital health applications (DiGAs) can now also be redeemed with other insurance companies.

**🙌 Registration for privately insured people** 
Registration for privately insured people has been optimized. You can log in conveniently with your Health ID in just a few clicks. 
 
 **⏰ Medication reminders** 
You can now set reminders to take your medication. 
 
 **🛒 Improved ordering flow** 
The ordering process is now simpler and faster. 
 
 **♿️ Accessibility** 
The access number for the health card can now also be scanned with the camera. 
 
 **📲 More information for DiGAs** 
From now on you will receive more detailed information about your DiGA prescriptions, such as the sales price or the logo.

**📝 Flexible field for delivery instructions** 
 The field for delivery instructions now automatically adjusts to the length of the text. 
 
 **🎨 More modern buttons with Material 3** 
 The buttons have been adapted to the new Material 3 design of Android and now have a more modern and rounded appearance. 
 
 **📤 Share Prescriptions** 
Prescriptions can now be shared with others directly from the app.

**🏛️ Registration for federal institutions** 
Registration is now also possible for those insured with federal institutions such as the Federal Police. 
 
 **🕒 Improved pharmacy opening hours** 
Emergency service and special closing times for pharmacies are now displayed, if they have been stored.

**🏡 Address Suggestions** 
Stored address data is now automatically suggested when entering an address. 
 
 **♿️ Accessibility** 
The contrast for text, toggle buttons, checkboxes, error messages, icons, and search bars has been increased. 
The speech output via TalkBack has been improved for PIN and password entry, the display of prescription codes, and the recognition of headings. Links are now consistently underlined in running text.

**✨ Display Prescription Codes** 
The screen for batch and single codes has been redesigned for more intuitive use. 
 
 **📋 Copy Function** 
Medication information can be copied by long-pressing. 
 
 **♿ Accessibility** 
Talkback and keyboard navigation work better, buttons are clearer, and list items are structured more logically. Animated videos play only once to support users with cognitive impairments.

**✨ Improved App Opening** 
Unlocking the app is now faster. 
 
 **📞 Expanded Contact Options** 
We've introduced new contact options for selected insurance policies. 
 
 **♿ Accessibility** 
The accessibility statement has been updated and expanded to include a section documenting the change history. Some buttons have been adjusted for improved visibility.
